name: Haystack
description: An open source AI framework for building production-ready applications with large language models.
longDescription: Haystack is an open-source framework developed by deepset, designed to help developers build production-ready applications using large language models (LLMs). It provides a modular architecture that allows for the creation of custom pipelines for tasks such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), document search, question answering, and more. Haystack integrates with various AI models and databases, offering flexibility and scalability for enterprise use cases. As a community-driven project, Haystack benefits from contributions from developers worldwide, ensuring continuous improvement and adaptation to the latest advancements in AI technology.
features: Modular pipeline architecture for custom AI applications
Support for multiple AI models and vector databases
Advanced retrieval methods for efficient data access
Integration with popular platforms like Hugging Face, OpenAI, and more
Open source with a vibrant community for support and development
